creator: cristian.cardoso11@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to wooyu from comment #13)
Hi wooyu, at the time I reported this bug there was no firmware update available for this intel card, so I didn't have much to do other than file a bug report. I had the bug occurring until version 13.0 and then the equipment where I ran baremetal FreeBSD was discontinued, so I no longer have a way to validate what you said.
